columns.Name: EVAL_STEP_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of Steps

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when the alert notification was sent.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: EVALUATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of Evaluation.

columns.Name: EVAL_PARTICIPANT_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the participant ID in a particular evaluation

columns.Name: PARENT_STEP_ID
columns.Comments: Indicatest the parent step ID to the current step

columns.Name: STEP_COMPLETED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the ID of person who completed this step

columns.Name: STEP_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicatest the date on which this step is completed

columns.Name: SEQUENCE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Indicates the processing sequence for the step

columns.Name: STEP_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the step code for the evaluation

columns.Name: STEP_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicaties the step status of the evaluation

columns.Name: DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the due date of the step code

columns.Name: CRITICAL_ALERT_DAYS
columns.Comments: Indicates the number of critical alert days before a notification is sent for this step

columns.Name: STANDARD_ALERT_DAYS
columns.Comments: Indicates the number of standard alert days before a notification is sent for this step

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: STEP_SUB_STATUS
columns.Comments: Sub status of the step.

columns.Name: ACTION_REASON
columns.Comments: Reason for performing the action on the step.

columns.Name: ACTION_PERFORMED_BY
columns.Comments: Stores the Person Id of the person performing the action.

columns.Name: ACTION_PERFORMED_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp when the action was performed

columns.Name: STEP_UPD_ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Action Code for performing the action on the evaluation step.

columns.Name: STEP_UPD_ACTION_REASON
columns.Comments: Reason for performing the action on the evaluation step.

columns.Name: STEP_UPD_ACTION_PERFORMED_BY
columns.Comments: Stores the Person Id of the person performing the action on the evaluation step.

columns.Name: STEP_UPD_ACTION_PERFORMED_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp when the action was performed on the evaluation step.
